steps.title: Compare the distances
steps.content: The JWST is almost one million miles beyond Earth's orbit. Hubble is only about 340 miles above Earth's surface. The transition must signal a sharp contrast.

steps.title: Choose a contrast signal
steps.content: Choice B signals cause and effect, Choice C signals sequence, and Choice D signals similarity. None matches the opposition between the two telescope locations. A contrast transition directly fits the relationship. The answer is A.
